Outreach Worker – 1.0 EFT (Permanent) – Wage $25.563 – 29.564 per hour – Deadline for application:  Wednesday, July 9, 2026 by 4:00 p.m.

Primary Care Lead (Family Physician), Manitoba HIV Program, Part-Time (0.2 EFT, 8 hours/week), Permanent [open until filled]

Primary Care Lead Manitoba HIV Program Job Description

Family Physician, Part-Time (0.5 EFT, 20 hours/week), Permanent

 

We are not currently hiring. We appreciate your interest and encourage you to stay tuned for any future opportunities by signing up for our newsletter or following us on social media!
